seo.title: Privacy Policy | Resoria
seo.description: Resoria privacy policy. How we collect, use and protect personal data when you use our website and software.

title: Privacy Policy
intro: At Resoria («we», «our»), we respect your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect personal information when you visit our website, request information, purchase licenses or use our software products, including Easy Restaurant and Mi Inventario.

sections.title: 1. Data controller
paragraphs: Resoria is the data controller for your personal data. You can contact us using the email address or phone number shown in the contact section of this website.

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
paragraphs: We may collect the following types of information: identification and contact details (name, email, phone), business-related information, details about the product or plan you are interested in, billing information when you make a purchase, and technical browsing data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) when you use our website.

If you use our software, we may also process operational data that you or your business enter into the application, such as orders, inventory, sales or internal user information, depending on the product purchased.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of processing
paragraphs: We use your data to: respond to inquiries and information requests; manage free trials, licenses and subscriptions; process payments and issue receipts; provide technical support and customer service; improve our products and services; send communications related to your account or purchase; comply with legal obligations; and, where necessary with your consent, send commercial information about our products.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
paragraphs: We process your data based on contract performance or pre-contractual measures, compliance with legal obligations, our legitimate interest in operating and improving our business, and, where applicable, your consent.

sections.title: 5. Data retention
paragraphs: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described, maintain the business relationship, resolve claims and comply with legal or tax obligations. Data will then be securely deleted or anonymized.

sections.title: 6. Sharing with third parties
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with providers that help us operate the website, process payments, host cloud services or provide support, always under confidentiality and appropriate processing obligations. We may also disclose data when required by law.

sections.title: 7. Security
paragraphs: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect information against unauthorized access, loss, alteration or disclosure. No system is completely infallible, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: 8. Your rights
paragraphs: Under applicable law, you may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction or objection to the processing of your data, as well as data portability where applicable. You may also withdraw your consent at any time if processing is based on it. To exercise your rights, contact us using the details on this site.

sections.title: 9. Cookies and similar technologies
paragraphs: Our website may use cookies or similar technologies to improve browsing experience and analyze site usage. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although some features may be affected.

sections.title: 10. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this privacy policy at any time. We will publish the current version on this page and indicate the date of the last update. We recommend reviewing it periodically.

contactNote: If you have questions about this policy or how we handle your data, contact us through the contact section of our website or the email address listed there.
